opening_line: I wanted to provide an update on the onboarding progress for Helio Retail.
body_paragraph: Priya Nair and Marcus Webb have been actively engaged in the onboarding process, ensuring that all necessary steps are being completed in a timely manner. They are currently working on finalizing the integration of our platform with Helio Retail's systems, which is a key milestone in the onboarding journey.
closing_line: I will keep you posted on any further developments as we move forward.
